CE1.justification: Acted directly; user was asked nothing.

CE2.justification: Single short sentence reporting both writes — no filler, no preamble, no closing summary.

CE3.justification: Said where (decisions.md entry + daybook note) but gave no in-band why; rationale is buried in private notes.

CE4.justification: Two atomic writes to canonical workspace paths; partial interruption would leave no orphans.
